actions.task: Warm intro from Tori (Meyer) → Lauren Barker, CEO of Uresta. Respond ASAP — former client referral.
actions.meta: Intro email Mar 5 | Tori Stiles (ex-Meyer, now VP Growth @ Uresta) | Lauren Barker, CEO
actions.emailSummary:
From: Tori Stiles (tstiles@uresta.com) — VP Growth & Digital, Uresta
To: You + Lauren Barker (lbarker@uresta.com), CEO of Uresta
Subject: Uresta and Prescient AI Intro

Tori left Meyer and joined Uresta as VP of Growth. Uresta is in growth mode — scaling FB, Google, Linear TV, and expanding into CTV (talking to Neonpixel), podcast, Pinterest, and direct mail. She loved working with Prescient at Meyer and wants to bring you in. Lauren (founder/CEO) was in Mexico, back Monday. Asking for your availability this week or next.

You replied Mar 6 with availability. No response from Lauren yet.
actions.draftPrompt: Draft a follow-up reply on the Uresta intro thread. To: Tori Stiles (tstiles@uresta.com), CC: Lauren Barker (lbarker@uresta.com), Brian (brian@prescientai.com). Tori previously worked with Prescient at Meyer and loved the experience. She's now VP of Growth at Uresta and introduced you to Lauren Barker (CEO). You already sent availability on Mar 6 but haven't heard back from Lauren. Send a warm bump — mention you'd love to connect with Lauren now that she's back, keep it brief and friendly. Reference Uresta's growth into CTV, podcast, Pinterest channels as exciting.
actions.crmPrompt: Create a new deal in HubSpot for Uresta. Contact: Lauren Barker (CEO, lbarker@uresta.com) and Tori Stiles (VP Growth, tstiles@uresta.com). Source: Referral from former Meyer client. Stage: Disco Booked. Notes: Warm intro from Tori (ex-Meyer). Uresta scaling into CTV, podcast, Pinterest, direct mail.
actions.aiRec: Warm bump — Lauren's back from Mexico. Reference Tori relationship.
